---
title: EDA
---

# Preparation

Load libraries.

```{r}
library(nanoparquet)
library(plotly)
library(glue)
library(tibble)
```

Read data.

```{r}
df <- read_parquet(config::get("calendar_long", config = "gold"))

head(df)
```

Create colors.

```{r}
party_palette <-
  df |>
  distinct(party_shortcut, party_color) |>
  deframe()
```

# EDA

Development of *all* parties.

```{r}
df |>
  plot_ly(
    x = ~date_published,
    y = ~voteshare,
    color = ~party_shortcut,
    colors = party_palette,
    type = 'scatter',
    mode = 'lines+markers',
    connectgaps = TRUE,
    hoverinfo = 'text',
    text = ~ glue(
      "Date: {date_published}<br>",
      "Value: {scales::percent(voteshare, accuracy = 0.1, suffix = ' %')}<br>",
      "Party: {party_shortcut} (party_id={party_id})<br>",
      "Agency: {agency} (agency_id={agency_id})"
    )
  ) |>
  layout(
    title = "Preference Over Time",
    xaxis = list(title = "Date"),
    yaxis = list(title = "Preference (%)", tickformat = ".0%"),
    legend = list(title = list(text = "Shortcut"))
  )
```

```{r}
no_merge_parties <- c(
  "768", # ANO
  "1178", # Auto
  "1327", # SPOLU
  "166", # STAN
  "1245" # Přísaha
)

df |>
  filter(party %in% no_merge_parties) |>
  plot_ly(
    x = ~date_published,
    y = ~voteshare,
    color = ~party_shortcut,
    colors = party_palette,
    type = 'scatter',
    mode = 'lines+markers',
    connectgaps = TRUE,
    hoverinfo = 'text',
    text = ~ glue(
      "Date: {date_published}<br>",
      "Value: {scales::percent(voteshare, accuracy = 0.1, suffix = ' %')}<br>",
      "Party: {party_shortcut} (party_id={party_id})<br>",
      "Agency: {agency} (agency_id={agency_id})"
    )
  ) |>
  layout(
    title = "Parties without merging",
    xaxis = list(title = "Date"),
    yaxis = list(title = "Preference (%)", tickformat = ".0%"),
    legend = list(title = list(text = "Shortcut"))
  )
```
